title: salvia officinalis f. lavandulifolia
intro: Salvia officinalis f. lavandulifolia, also known as Spanish sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia officinalis plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis f. lavandulifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health, among others. Salvia officinalis f. lavandulifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, and is also used in culinary applications for its savory flavor.
